source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p>9th Way Insignia is a service-disabled, veteran-owned small business bringing transformative technology to our government customers so they can achieve their missions.&nbsp; Our specialties include cybersecurity, cloud modernization, software development, data analytics, enterprise architecture, enterprise IT, analytics, process automation, and artificial intelligence. &nbsp;Learn more about 9th Way Insignia at <a href="https://9thwayinsignia.com/">https://9thwayinsignia.com/.</a></p>
<p>Application password: Niner</p></div><p><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Team (Project) Introduction </span></span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">The Office of Performance Analysis and Integrity&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">manages</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;and enhances the Veterans Benefits Administration (VBA) Enterprise Data Warehouse (EDW) which&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">resides</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;on one Oracle M8 Supercluster database and thirteen application servers.  Our team provides the technical services&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">required</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;to sustain EDW applications to include Project Management, Data Warehouse Management, Advanced Analytics, Tableau Server Administration/Tableau Desktop Administration, Technical Collaboration Support, Lessons Learned, Executive Orders and Special Projects, Architectural Enhancement, and Cloud Migration. We also provide management, enhancement, integration, implementation, maintenance, modernization, and infrastructure support for EDW applications as well as enhancement and maintenance of business intelligence capabilities and predictive analytics.  </span></span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)"> </span></span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">9th Way Insignia is looking for a Program Manager to join and lead this team.  </span></span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)"> </span></span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">Professional Level Information: </span></span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">A Level 4 Manager at 9th Way Insignia&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">accomplishes</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;department&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">objectives</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;by managing staff and processes and evaluating department activities. A Manager&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">is responsible for</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;planning,&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">directing</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Normal (Web)">&nbsp;and overseeing the operations and fiscal health of a unit, division, or department.
